title: Periods of automorphic forms over reductive subgroups
abstract: We present a regularization procedure of period integrals of automorphic forms on a group $G$ over an arbitrary reductive subgroup $G' \subset G$. As a consequence we obtain an explicit $G'(\mathbb{A})$-invariant functional on the space of automorphic forms on $G$ whose exponents avoid certain prescribed hyperplanes. We also provide a necessary and sufficient condition for convergence of period integrals of automorphic forms in terms of their exponents.
comment: Convergence criterion improved. Small changes in presentation. 39 pages, 10 figures
